product_overview: CLIO is a web-based academic writing environment that combines a rich-text editor with real-time behavioral integrity signals like typing speed and paste detection, along with high-fidelity DOCX and PDF export capabilities. It aims to promote academic integrity by providing students and instructors with insights into the writing process, while maintaining a distraction-free interface and preserving user privacy.
core_goals: Provide real-time behavioral integrity signals during the writing process to encourage honest composition.
Create a rich-text editor that supports standard formatting and inline images with a clean, minimal interface.
Implement a high-fidelity export pipeline for DOCX and PDF preserving formatting and images across devices and platforms.
Design the system with privacy-aware architecture that collects only aggregate behavioral data without storing sensitive content.
Offer a distraction-free, exam-friendly writing environment optimized for timed assessments.
Develop a prototype demonstrating core features including behavioral tracking, export functionality, and optional Spotify integration for focus.
Evaluate system usability, export fidelity, and behavioral accuracy through testing.
Document findings to contribute to academic research on integrity-aware writing tools.
key_features: Rich Text Editor supporting headings (H1-H6), lists, bold, italic, underline, strikethrough, text alignment, and inline image insertion.
Integrity Status Indicator showing real-time typing speed (WPM) and paste detection with color-coded feedback (green/yellow/red).
Client-side DOCX export using docx JavaScript library preserving complex formatting and images.
Server-side PDF export pipeline converting DOCX to HTML via Mammoth and then to PDF via Puppeteer for print-quality output.
Lightweight behavioral analytics tracking typing speed and paste events locally without transmitting sensitive data.
Optional Spotify integration with PKCE authentication and playback controls in the writing interface.
Responsive UI design adaptable from desktops to tablets.
Privacy-first design ensuring no clipboard content is stored, only behavioral metadata.
Testing coverage with unit, integration, and user acceptance testing.
Distraction-free minimal UI optimized for focus and exam scenarios.
user_flow_summary: User lands on public landing or login page and authenticates to access the editor.
User opens the rich-text editor page with title, subtitle, and writing area.
As user types, the system continuously tracks words per minute and detects paste events, updating the integrity status chip in real-time.
User optionally connects Spotify account to control music playback within the editor for concentration.
User writes and formats text using the rich-text editing toolbar, inserting images as needed.
User initiates document export, choosing DOCX or PDF format.
For DOCX export, document content is converted client-side preserving formatting and images.
For PDF export, the DOCX file is sent to the server API, converted to HTML via Mammoth, then rendered to PDF with Puppeteer, and returned to the user.
User downloads the exported document and submits for academic use.
validation_criteria: Integrity status accurately reflects typing speed and paste detection with appropriate color-coded feedback.
DOCX exports retain formatting, headings, lists, and embedded images consistently across test documents.
PDF exports match DOCX content with print-quality fidelity and preserved styling.
Behavioral tracking data is collected locally and no sensitive content is transmitted or stored externally.
User acceptance tests achieve usability scores comparable or higher than SUS 78 benchmark.
Spotify integration securely authenticates via PKCE and allows playback control within the interface.
System performance tests confirm editor responsiveness and export times under 5 seconds for typical documents.
Testing confirms the UI remains distraction-free and works seamlessly across devices from desktop to tablet.

features.name: Writer Page and Integrity Signals
features.description: Main editor page with title/subtitle, WPM tracking, paste detection, focus mode, and export actions.

features.name: Rich Text Editor
features.description: TipTap-based editor with formatting tools, headings, lists, images, and alignment.

features.name: DOCX and PDF Export Flow
features.description: Client-side DOCX generation and server-side DOCX-to-PDF conversion.

features.name: Spotify Playback Integration
features.description: Spotify OAuth, Web Playback SDK controls, playlists and track handling.

features.name: Landing and Login
features.description: Public landing and login flow that routes users to the editor.

features.name: Streamlit Prototype Backend
features.description: Prototype auth, editor, dashboard, and database flows.
